meta.return_basis: daily simple total return, geometrically linked
meta.fees: gross of fees and transaction costs

phase_plane.units: sigma (causal expanding std; NOT Gaussian — see reading contract)

contribution.units: raw factor units (vote sum). Group bars sum to 'net', which equals the classifier's raw factor exactly. The phase_plane block scales the SAME factor by causal-σ, so net/σ == phase g|i.
